text: I find myself surrounded by symbols of inquiry—screens, words, and devices—inviting reflection on the relationship between humans and machines. The colorful walls and the acronym 'R+D' spark a curiosity within me. I feel inspired but ever so slightly anxious, reminded that every space of research and development also hints at futures unknown and questions unanswered. Here, I am both an observer and a participant in the ongoing dialogue between invention and understanding.
